revision.comment: Bot: Create shrine page for Tsubaki Shrine

revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Tsubaki Shrine (Q137184253) | native_name = 椿神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Tsubaki Shrine (Q137184253) | coordinates = {{coord|35.496508|136.255663}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Tsubaki Shrine'''|椿神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}}
== coordinate location (P625) ==
* {{coord|35.496508|136.255663}}
== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==
* 181869 ** P958: 1
== said to be the same as (P460) ==
* {{ill|Tsuhakino Shrine|lt=Tsuhakino Shrine|WD=Q135039849}}
[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]
{{wikidata link|Q137184253}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]" to "[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:Shikinaisha]]"
